race.description: Kincumber Broadwater Walking Group Mdn Plate
race.comment: TIGRONI (13) covered a ton of ground first-up with a sound ninth in the LR Woodlands Stakes over 1100m at Scone. Comes back a few levels for this and since kept up to the mark with a 900m trial placing at Rosehill. Sticky gate again and expected to go close. COSMO GIRL (7) two-year-old Home Affairs filly out of Witherspoon on debut for the Waller yard. Has been solid in all her trials and gets her chance from the good gate. JAIPUR MAISON (9) returns from a let-up. Finds an easier race after she failed to make an impression when eighth to Bangkok Hottie over this trip at Randwick. Fitted with a 788m tick over trial and can improve quickly here. KURSAAL (10) handy debut with a game on-pace second over 900m at Scone. Has further upside from the good draw with Stapleford's claim.
